headline: Alibaba Unveils New Chip Design to Meet Surging Demand for AI
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. is launching a new chip for agentic AI and inference computing, adding to a portfolio of semiconductors designed to drive its artificial intelligence ambitions.The Hangzhou-based company’s research arm, Damo Academy, on Tuesday unveiled XuanTie C950, a central processor unit based on the RISC-V architecture. The CPU is optimized for cloud computing, and it allows customers to tailor the chip for their specific inferencing use, Alibaba said in a statement

content.title: Alibaba Unveils New Chip Design to Meet Surging Demand for AI
content.summary: (Bloomberg) -- Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. is launching a new chip for agentic AI and inference computing, adding to a portfolio of semiconductors designed to drive its artificial intelligence ambitions.The Hangzhou-based company’s research arm, Damo Academy, on Tuesday unveiled XuanTie C950, a central processor unit based on the RISC-V architecture. The CPU is optimized for cloud computing, and it allows customers to tailor the chip for their specific inferencing use, Alibaba said in a statement

headline: KeyCare Deploys NVIDIA Nemotron to Power AI-Driven Clinical Intake at Scale
summary: CHICAGO, March 24, 2026--KeyCare, the only national Epic-based virtual care group, today announced the deployment of NVIDIA’s Nemotron large language model in production to power its AI-driven patient intake agent. KeyCare selected Nemotron for its strong reasoning performance, consistency, and suitability for real-world clinical workflows.

content.title: KeyCare Deploys NVIDIA Nemotron to Power AI-Driven Clinical Intake at Scale

KeyCare selected Nemotron for its strong reasoning performance, consistency, and suitability for real-world clinical workflows.

Alongside the World's 50 Most Innovative Companies, Fast Company recognizes 720 honorees across 59 sectors and regions.

headline: Upwind Named to Fast Company’s Annual List of the World’s Most Innovative Companies of 2026

This year’s list shines a spotlight on businesses that are shaping industry and culture through innovation.

headline: Memory Is Wall Street’s Favorite Tech Trade as Mag 7 Disappoints
summary: (Bloomberg) -- In the stock market’s volatile and uncertain start to the year, one trade has held strong: go long memory and storage.Companies like Sandisk Corp., Western Digital Corp., and Seagate Technology Holdings Plc are among the leaders in the S&P 500 Index in 2026, even with their recent declines, as heavy spending on artificial intelligence creates insatiable demand for memory and storage components used in data centers.
